summary: Completed backend testing of refactored Rasoi-Sync API. All 20 tests passed (100% success rate). The backend was successfully refactored from a monolithic 3600+ line server.py into a modular architecture with separate models/, data/, services/, and routes/ directories. All API endpoints work correctly after refactoring.
passed_tests: Health endpoint /api/health returns healthy status
Inventory monthly-defaults endpoint returns category defaults (grains, pulses, spices, dairy, oils, vegetables, fruits)
Inventory household endpoint requires authentication (401/403)
Inventory household endpoint returns items for authenticated user with active household
YouTube recommendations endpoint returns pre-fetched videos (5 videos, quota_cost=0)
Preferences endpoint returns user preferences with favorite_channels
Authentication flow - login with recipe_tester@test.com/TestPass123! succeeds
Authentication flow - login with test@test.com/test123 succeeds
Authentication flow - login with invalid credentials returns 401
Shopping list endpoint requires authentication
Shopping list endpoint returns items for authenticated user
Meal plans endpoint requires authentication
Meal plans endpoint returns plans for authenticated user
Translation endpoint translates text to Hindi (Hello -> नमस्ते)
Translation endpoint translates text to Marathi
Barcode lookup endpoint queries Open Food Facts API
Barcode lookup with known product returns response
Festival alert endpoint returns response (null or festival data)
Inventory household returns 400 error for user without active household
YouTube local recipe search returns results
critical_code_review_comments: Modular architecture is well-organized: models/, data/, services/, routes/ directories
Factory pattern used for route creation (create_*_routes functions) - good for dependency injection
All routes properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses using {'_id': 0}
Translation service has proper caching with community verification threshold
YouTube service has quota-efficient caching for search results and channel info
All Pydantic models use ConfigDict(extra='ignore') for flexibility
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular architecture is complete and verified. All 11 features from the review request tested and working: health, inventory monthly-defaults, YouTube recommendations, preferences, authentication (both test users), authenticated inventory/shopping/meal-plans endpoints, translation to Hindi, barcode lookup, and festival alert. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_refactored_backend.py with 20 comprehensive tests.
